name: Pirate Steak
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef sirloin steak, 1 1/2 - 2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except steak, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Simmer the mixture for 30 minutes.
3. Brush the beef steak with the sauce before grilling.
4. Place the steak on a grill positioned 4 inches from medium coals.
5. Cook the steak for 15 minutes on each side, basting frequently with the sauce.
6. Season the steak with salt and pepper after turning it and after removing it from the grill.
7. Serve with the remaining sauce.
